Bash(source .venv/bin/activate && pip list | grep -i flet; python -c "import flet" 2>&1; find .venv/lib -maxdepth 5 -name "__init__.py" | xargs grep -l "flet" 2>/dev/null | head -5)
Bash(source .venv/bin/activate && python -c "import importlib.metadata; print\(importlib.metadata.version\('flet'\)\)" 2>&1; ls .venv/lib/python3.12/site-packages/ | grep flet)

Bash(source .venv/bin/activate && python -c "
import importlib.util, os, platform
_sdk_spec = importlib.util.find_spec\('claude_agent_sdk'\)
_cli_name = 'claude.exe' if platform.system\(\) == 'Windows' else 'claude'
if _sdk_spec and _sdk_spec.origin:
    p = os.path.join\(os.path.dirname\(_sdk_spec.origin\), '_bundled', _cli_name\)
    print\('Claude binary:', p, 'exists:', os.path.exists\(p\)\)
else:
    print\('claude_agent_sdk not found'\)
")
